notes: Spec asserts two bullets: (1) session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms — vibe's CommandPattern-matched proc-<PID> pre-session row satisfies both, independent of when messages.jsonl materializes. Birth templated from the codex sibling's session-start shape, which likewise asserts birth+pid within 1s and does NOT model the presession→real-session reconcile here (out of scope for session-start). BACKFLOW: the offline replay golden CANNOT reproduce vibe's meta.json sidecar (replay stages only transcript.jsonl; model + tokens are sidecar-only, read live), so model and tokens are UNVERIFIABLE offline — the observation vector asserts neither model nor tokens and matches kiro-cli (agent only, cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false).

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
